title: Antanas Valionis
content: Antanas Valionis (born September 21, 1950) is a Lithuania n politician, currently a member of the New Union party. He was appointed the Lithuanian Minister of Foreign Affairs on October 30, 2000, and reappointed on July 5, 2001. He resigned on August 31, 2006. From 1981 he served in the Soviet secret police KGB in Riga reaching the rank of captain. Afterwards he served in the KGB active reserve.
